items.title: [正面] I picked this game up on a whim.  Found it randoml...
items.summary: I picked this game up on a whim.  Found it randomly and decided to give it a go. The first chapter instantly had me hooked, both the characters and the Lovecraftian setting. The gacha is very generous and they even give you a couple free characters and chances to claim your own. From what I know, the game is mostly translated in English with some incredible art to go with it. I can't wait to keep playing this game.

items.title: [正面] Immaculate game. steam says I have 61, but I have...
items.summary: Immaculate game. steam says I have 61, but I have over 100 on the actual game because there is a mobile version. It's long too, I would have double if not triple he hours if I had more attention on all the cutscenes and story, but even so, I still feel emersed and invested into the game play and what I do understand from the story, once you get the hang of the gameplay, collecting characters becomes not only easier, but also enjoyable. Speaking of, getting to gamble a lot makes my dopamine spike, so if you are like me, gambling is very accessable. Is very good game
